claim: 95% of AI pilot projects fail; the root cause is missing or fractured context—better models alone do not fix broken context architecture
actionable: Before building agents, invest in a context graph or unified knowledge representation layer rather than relying on text similarity alone.
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Nyah Macklin: The AI Said So? How to Build Auditable AI Agents Using Context Graphs

claim: Text similarity retrieval (naive RAG) has a blind spot for relationships; structured similarity (entity connections) is needed for auditable decisions
actionable: Use hybrid search combining vector similarity with graph-based (structured) similarity to capture both semantic and relational information.
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Nyah Macklin: The AI Said So? How to Build Auditable AI Agents Using Context Graphs

claim: Context graphs combined with RAG (Graph RAG) achieved 91% accuracy vs 37% base model on 3GPP QA; RAG alone only reached 54%
actionable: Implement knowledge graphs + RAG together for complex domain tasks; do not rely on RAG alone.
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Nyah Macklin: The AI Said So? How to Build Auditable AI Agents Using Context Graphs

claim: Context graphs provide decision traceability showing what information agents considered and why they reached a conclusion
actionable: Build context graphs with entities, events, and decisions; enable agents to traverse nodes/edges to produce causal chains explaining their reasoning.
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Nyah Macklin: The AI Said So? How to Build Auditable AI Agents Using Context Graphs

claim: Use graph algorithms (Fast RP, KNN, Louvain, PageRank) to detect fraud patterns and identify structural/topological similarity in decision data
actionable: Apply graph embedding algorithms like Fast RP and topological algorithms to detect anomalies and find precedents in your context graph.
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Nyah Macklin: The AI Said So? How to Build Auditable AI Agents Using Context Graphs

claim: Hybrid search combining graph embeddings (Fast RP) with vector similarity is powerful for finding both semantic and structural matches
actionable: Use graph data science tools (e.g., Neo4j GDS) to generate graph embeddings and combine with vector search for richer retrieval.
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Nyah Macklin: The AI Said So? How to Build Auditable AI Agents Using Context Graphs

claim: For enterprise AI agents making real decisions (hiring, credit, medical), auditability and explainability are non-negotiable requirements
actionable: Design agents from day one with decision traceability; do not treat auditability as an afterthought.
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Nyah Macklin: The AI Said So? How to Build Auditable AI Agents Using Context Graphs

claim: GraphAcademy (graphacademy.com) offers free, hands-on courses for learning graph algorithms, graph embeddings, and building agents with graphs
actionable: Enroll in GraphAcademy free courses on graph algorithms and agentic design to build production-ready context graph systems.
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Nyah Macklin: The AI Said So? How to Build Auditable AI Agents Using Context Graphs
